jobs.title: Deputy Manager - Reporting & MIS
jobs.description: About The Role Ensure that statutory reporting is completed in compliance manner and on timely basis. Ensure that group reporting is completed in compliant manner and on timely basis. Ensure completion of limited review and audits with quality and controls on a timely basis. Perform basic analysis on the financial statement How Will You Do It Finalize of accounts Statutory audit of BIL on quarterly basis and on yearly basis (including liaison with PwC) Explain the financial performance of BIL to external Board members during Audit Committee and Board Meetings Prepare finance forecasts for BIL Ensure adequacy, efficiency and effectiveness of Internal Controls over Financial Reporting (with BASC, ZFR/FC) Manage group reporting of BIL on monthly basis (including preparation of express report) Provide support in terms of Non trade portal Manage financial statement review preparation Provide data for CEQ - FRC Prepare the Corporate Governance folder on quarterly bas is for BIL Board reporting What We Look For Edu c a t i o n: Chartered Accountant W o r k in g Experience: 5 years+ ( experience with MNC /or Big 4 audit firms is a must) T e c hn i c a l Professional Knowledge: Up-to-date and Expert know-how of Indian and IFRS accounting standards and local regulations (e.g, Companies Act, Listing Agreement etc.) Work Location Godrej One - Mumbai

jobs.title: Head - Direct and Indirect Tax
jobs.description: About The Role Ensure 100% regulatory compliance of GST, Income tax Transfer Pricing Manage tax litigations and tax risks in business operations. Strive for tax optimization and tax saving opportunities. How You Will Do It Advise the management on tax impact, transaction methodology for key projects, business model changes, acquisition, or divestiture Hold governance role for ensuring and documenting related party transactions are being executed at Arm’s Length basis Drive projects to minimize tax risks and create tax related opportunities Ensure strong representation of BASF at all stages of assessment proceedings and expedite speedy disposals Ensure timely completion of tax audit, returns and Transfer Pricing audits Manage quarterly advance tax computation and payments and meeting income tax officials regarding advance tax queries. Manage quarterly tax provisions and aligning it with auditors for the purpose of their review. Ensure filing review of monthly GST returns, ISD returns, Job worker returns, VAT assessments, VAT audits on pan India basis. Ensure collection of eligible tax refunds in case of exports of goods services Analyze various business transactions/exception reports/monitor GST dashboards for effective utilization of tax credits Implement best practices and tax automation technology in tax management and reporting Coordinate with global and regional tax colleagues on various tax issues. What We LookFor Education: Chartered Accountant Working Experience: 15 years+ (experience with MNCs in Manufacturing Industry /or Big 4 audit firms is a must) Technical Professional Knowledge: GST, Direct Taxation, DTAA Transfer Pricing regulations Work Location Godrej One - Mumbai

jobs.title: Chief Financial Officer - BASF Agricultural Solutions India Pvt. Ltd.
jobs.description: Objective of the Position: The Chief Financial Officer (CFO) will be a strategic partner to the Board and Management, responsible for financial stewardship, capital allocation, and sustainable value creation for the new legal entity BASF Agricultural Solutions India Ltd. Given the Company’s stock‑exchange listing in India , chemical manufacturing footprint , and German parentage , the role has a strong emphasis on: Financial reporting, Indian Accounting Standards, and Tax compliance including intercompany pricing License to Operate (LTO) with respect to financial and tax Building a strong, future‑ready finance organization Key Responsibilities 1. Financial Leadership Strategy Lead the development and execution of the Company’s financial strategy , aligned with long‑term business and sustainability objectives. Oversee budgeting, forecasting, treasury, working capital management, and capital expenditure planning for manufacturing operations. Provide strategic insights to the Board and CEO on profitability, cost optimization, pricing, and investment decisions . Support inorganic growth initiatives, including M A, joint ventures, and technology investments , where applicable. 2. Regulatory Compliance Governance (Listed Entity Focus) Ensure full compliance with: Companies Act, 2013 and SEBI Listing Regulations with respect to financial reporting and matters connected therewith Indian Accounting Standards / IFRS reporting Income‑tax, GST, customs, and transfer pricing regulations Act as a key management representative to the Audit Committee , ensuring high standards of financial integrity and disclosure . review quarterly, annual, and event‑based disclosures from finance perspective to stock exchanges, ensuring accuracy, timeliness, and completeness. 3. Related Party Transactions (RPTs) Intercompany Governance oversee Related Party Transactions with the German parent and global group entities, specifically with respect to: Arm’s length pricing and transfer pricing compliance Robust documentation and approval processes Partner with legal, secretarial, and tax teams to mitigate risks arising from intercompany transactions. 4. License to Operate (LtO) – Financial Regulatory Stewardship Act as a custodian of the Company’s financial and regulatory License to Operate , ensuring sustained trust with: Investors, analysts, and lenders Joint‑venture and group stakeholders Oversee financial aspects for reporting purposes. Ensure robust internal controls, risk management frameworks, and audit processes to protect the Company’s reputation and continuity. 5. Financial Stakeholder Management Build credibility with banks, financial institutions, rating agencies, and auditors . Act as a key interface with the German parent company , aligning local statutory requirements with global reporting, and performance expectations. 6. Team Building Capability Development Build, lead, and mentor a high‑performing finance organization , covering: Financial accounting reporting Taxation and its related compliances Business finance Treasury and internal audit Key Qualifications Experience: Chartered Accountant (CA) ; MBA (Finance) or equivalent qualification preferred. 20+ years of progressive finance leadership experience , with significant exposure as CFO / Deputy CFO / Finance Head in Listed companies in India (ideally MNCs) preferably in Manufacturing and / or chemical/process industries Demonstrated expertise in: Related Party Transactions and intercompany structures Indian Accounting Standards, taxation, and transfer pricing presenting finance related matters to Board of listed Company Prior experience working with multinational companies (preferably European/German) is highly desirable. Proven track record of building and leading large finance teams . Key Competencies Strong governance mindset with high ethical standards Ability to operate at Board and Audit Committee level Strategic thinking with hands‑on execution capability Strong acumen in steering and handling financial statements (e.g. P L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow Statements etc.) Cross‑cultural effectiveness in global matrix organizations Clear communicator with strong stakeholder engagement

jobs.title: Specialist SCM Process Management - Materials Management and Warehouse Management
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position: We are looking for a Specialist SCM Process Management – Materials Management and Warehouse Management to support the global business. In this role, you will act as a process expert for SAP MM and WM, driving global process optimization, supporting operations, and ensuring harmonized, efficient supply chain execution across regions. Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities: Support, analyze, optimize, and harmonize Materials Management (MM) and Warehouse Management (WM) processes across all locations. Ensure consistent execution of SAP processes covering procurement, inventory management, inbound/outbound logistics, and warehouse operations. Identify digitalization opportunities and drive process improvement initiatives globally. Training and Change Management: Develop and deliver training programs for end-users and support change management initiatives to ensure smooth adoption of new systems and processes. Assess Business Requirements: Collaborate with stakeholders to understand and analyze warehouse management needs and translate them into effective SAP solutions. Serve as the SCM MM/WM process expert within the business unit and provide first-level global support for SAP MM/WM users and help resolve system/process issues. Collaborate with global IT and digitalization teams to implement improvements or enhancements and Support configuration discussions, review functional specifications, and validate solution design. Act as the link between Cellasto business teams and IT/digitalization stakeholders. Translate business needs into SAP requirements, ensuring alignment with global templates and standards. Coordinate with Procurement, Production, Logistics, Customer Service, and Engineering teams on process topics. Participate as a test user for SAP upgrades, releases, and enhancements. Prepare, execute, validate, and document test cases. Support defect resolution and ensure system readiness for go-live. Support creation and global standardization of SAP label printing solutions for Cellasto. Ensure accuracy, compliance, and harmonization across international sites. Lead or support global SCM/IT projects related to MM/WM. Conduct requirements gathering, process mapping, documentation, and training. Support changing management activities to ensure smooth adoption across global teams. Monitor SCM KPIs such as inventory accuracy, warehouse throughput, and TO cycle times. Identify improvement opportunities and implement sustainable corrective actions. Ensure adherence to global processes, compliance, and audit standards. Requirements: Bachelor/Master’s degree in Business, Supply Chain, Logistics, Information Technology, or related field. English fluency required; German or Mandarin is an asset. Experience in Supply Chain Management or SCM related IT roles. Proven experience as a Functional SAP WM and MM Consultant with a strong understanding of warehouse management processes. Stronger focus on the technical part Expertise in SAP WM and MM configuration and customization and Experience with SAP S/4HANA is a plus with Strong analytical and problem-solving skills Understanding of OTC, logistics, and warehouse processes. And Integration with other SAP Modules like PP and QM. Strong presentation and communication skills.

jobs.title: Data Science Specialist - IP (on contract)
jobs.description: How You Will Do It Participate in the design and development of end-to-end AI and analytics full-stack solutions using relevant technologies.• Independently define solution approaches, develop required functionalities, and implement them by analyzing inputs and desired outputs. Perform data preprocessing, harmonization, and feature engineering to prepare modeling datasets. Design and develop a scalable, modular architecture for new and existing AI applications. Demonstrate hands-on experience with LLM-based AI agent orchestration, workflow automation, and guardrails across the full lifecycle. Have experience with cutting-edge technologies such as RAG, MCP, A2A, and knowledge graphs. Bring professional experience in developing full-stack web applications, including web apps and REST APIs, with strong back-end and front-end software engineering skills. Possess advanced Python programming skills and experience with relevant data science/AI frameworks and agentic AI orchestration tools and workflows, such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, Temporal, Celery, Airflow, and Dagster. Have solid DevOps skills and cloud infrastructure knowledge, including Docker and Kubernetes. Quickly and independently get up to speed on new topics. Apply strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills. Exercise sound independent judgment while collaborating with others and influencing project teams. What We Look For Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data science, Data Analytics or a similar fields 2-4 years of working experience Work Location BASF Innovation campus at Turbhe, Navi Mumbai

jobs.title: Manager-Occupational, Transport & Environment Safety
jobs.description: About The Role Provide support to all stake holders of BASF in India for the effective implementation of Organization, Occupational Safety, Environment protection Transport Safety discipline initiatives to ensure safety of employees in work, prevention of incidents and continuous improvement in EHS performance of the organization Support the organization in effective implementation of Occupational Safety, Environment Protection and Transport safety strategy, rules and regulation to ensure that national requirements, BASF strategies and requirements are fulfilled and high standard of EHS performance is achieved Interpret, translate, and support the mandatory requirements in Occupational safety, Environmental protection, Transport safety and Organization disciplines. Support the HUB and corporate EHS governance in effective implementation of new programs. Follow up OS, EP and TDS targets and KPI to improve EHS performance of the organization. Support the digitalization team in developing EHS tools and support implementation in India. Conduct RCMS audits (internal and external) How You Will Do It Occupational Safety Support the implementation of Organization, Occupational Safety, TDS and Environment protection program in India with collaboration with EHS HUB and corporate governance (COR) Oversee safety related regulatory development in India and facilitate regulatory compliance at sites companies by coordinating gap analysis and planning for compliance effort with stakeholders at sites. Coordinate on incident reporting with stake holders, e.g. offices, sites, farms to ensure timely and 100% incident reporting. Coordinate and support incident reporting and management process for all injury cases. Support root cause analysis whenever required. Monitor and follow up of incident flash compilation and distribution. Also coordinate the incident learning sharing between the sites Participate in the incident investigation of high potential cases. Support production/ construction sites in India to achieve green rating in the Global RC Audits Conduct internal spot check audits for plants/facilities Arrange and conduct pre-audits with project team, procurement and BU for the production / construction sites, ARS sites, Initiate and coordinate improvement measures with sites and project teams. Conduct pre- assessments for toller selection Carry out RCMS training for suppliers/tollers/customers as per the business requirement. Carry out pre assessment of new offices or co sharing offices. Deliver safety training to respective sites, offices as per requirements. Assessment of logistics service providers (RSA and WSA) and closure of action items post-reviewing the implementation of these items. Support ODs to understand and implement EHS regulations and BASF requirements with respect to Transportation and Distribution Safety of new and existing chemicals and products. Track DG shipments by coordinating with sites and the Supply Chain Management (SCM) team. Providing expert advice to 3rd party emergency response service providers and ODs to manage offsite TDS incidents and accidents Coordinate with ICC for KPI reporting, Aditya Birla award nomination, RC logo recertification. Participate and contribute to the regional and global Occupational Safety and Environment Protection meetings Support in the compilation for Annual report and Business sustainability report Support the team in effective implementation of Plastic Waste management rules. Country Code Leadership Act as Country RC Code Leader on Organization, Occupational Safety, Transport Safety, Environment Protection and General EHS topics (OS) Provide advisory and consultancy services to the sites and interface with HUB. Support country strategy in ensuring legal compliance, corporate conformance, and continuous improvement. Provide On-demand services to Sites on Organization, Occupational Safety, Environment Protection and General EHS topics (OS) Provides leadership and directions of RC code subjects. Performs day-to-day consolidated functional RC code tasks. Establishes and maintain country RC code requirements. What We Look For Education: bachelor’s degree in chemical engineering or master’s degree in science Diploma in Safety would be an additional advantage. Working Experience: At least 10~15 years working experience in production, engineering or EHS English Proficiency: Level 3 Technical Professional Knowledge: Excellent communication and management skill, familiar with local legislation system and legal requirements in EHS. Must have good understanding of scope and function of EHS units. Work Location Godrej One - Mumbai

jobs.title: Site Controller
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position: This position is required to guide, challenge and advise the organization towards economic decision-making and value generation. Ensure that financial practices align with the overall corporate strategy while also adhering to local regulations and standards. Enforce compliance with financial policies and procedures. To facilitate the site management in steering the business and evaluating the costs in the legal entity. Develops financial competencies, partnering with key site functions and business, systems and reports to help improve performance, in respect of rules standards to ensure full compliance. This position will be based in Thane and Vikhroli - incumbent is required to travel between these two lcoations as and when required. Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities: Prepare Business Reports (Site Management inclusive) and maintain BASF Applications: Prepare and present accurate financial statements and reports to senior management. Monitor and ensure compliance with accounting principles and standards Reports prepared punctually and accurately Key Performance Indicators (KPIs): Product Costing report Sales Performance Overview: Role as variant BASF application gate keeper on site, e.g. Contract Management Database, COINS (Cost Consolidated Reporting and Analysis), I-Comp (ICTP), MARIS, Ocean, CARAT, SCII, etc. Support Site CAPEX / OpEx (Small Investment or potential regional/global project): Manage annual Small Investment Planning Analyze Small Investment cost development, number of CAPEX and make sure budget under control. Manage potential regional or global project(s) planning taking place, in alignment with regional / global counterparts. Setup and on-going support to project Application and closing, for example project capital injection, project tax refund coordination, project equipment custom duty-free register, etc. Deliver relevant training, build up site team knowledge on Finance. Supervise BU/FU/Company Operational Planning, Business Analysis: Manage OMP operational planning process, cost budget and production planning in alignment with the region Ensure that standard costing is done in compliance with BASF accounting guidelines Definition, target setting and monitoring of KPIs in the site organization Monthly report fixed cost, variable cost and cost of sales comparison BGT/ACT/FC and information to management Monitor and report operation result of Manufacturing, Maintenance, Infrastructures, WWTP utilities. Support various stock taking in the site organization Set up company level VBM and KPI and work with plant managers on constant improvement in plant costs Monthly monitoring to ensure performance under control. Implement and monitor cost control measures to enhance profitability and operational efficiency. Analyze cost structures and recommend cost-saving initiatives. Review and approve all site-related expenditures, ensuring alignment with budgetary constraints. Constantly seeking improvement in processes to increase efficiency and effectiveness Responsible for OMP Manufacturing Cost and Allocation Key Analysis: Monitor Process Order settlement rate and close the order in urgent case. Monitor/analyze company manufacturing cost development (e.g. utilities, infrastructure, wastewater, indirect service charge, direct cost, etc.). Monitoring BOM, Recipes, Business Process to make sure Process order properly operated Cross BU/plant cost allocation agreement for shared costs (idle cost, cost difference, etc.) Monitor material price (e.g. PUP price, standard price, make investigation on significant price fluctuation, etc.) Check SAP cost estimate before month end costing run. Site all cost centre gate keeper including cost set up and allocation key update. Support OpEx (Operational Excellence Measures) by validating and challenging benefits provided by site managers for OpEx Compliance and Risk Management: Ensure compliance with local, state, and federal financial regulations and laws. Identify financial risks and implement appropriate risk mitigation strategies. Liaise with external auditors during financial audits. Coordinate both internal and external audits (e.g. CEQ, Project audit A/W, operation audit, FRC audit, KPMG, FX, Tax, Customs, Supplier auditor, including follow up case) Advises Site colleagues on compliance matters Teamwork and Interface Management: Teamwork with other related teams, i.e. SAP team, logistic team. R D team, maintenance team. To execute as LBM representative on assignments to ensure alignment among regional and local stakeholders to fulfil business objectives Business Support to Development Lab: Support the PU Development Lab with regards to accounting and financial matters including payments, sale of scrap, allocations, process setup Manage operational planning process of Lab, cost budget and monitor costs, recommend cost- saving initiatives, improve efficiency and effectiveness Manage annual capex plan and make sure no budget variance Deliver relevant training, build up site team knowledge on Finance. Projects and Back-up: Be a back-up for other PM site controllers as and when required. Active participation and engage with other Site controllers to share best practices. Lead and participate in ad-hoc projects locally or for the region Fixed Cost planning, forecasting and monitoring for APMA- India Requirements: CA degree in Finance or Accounting Around 5 years working experience in international manufacturing company in manufacturing environment Strong cost accounting and financial analysis capabilities, project management and transversal relations skills Proficient in English communication

jobs.title: Technical Service Lab Executive
jobs.description: About The Role We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Technical Service Lab Executive to join our laboratory team. The ideal candidate will support product testing, customer complaint analysis, formulation support, and technical service activities. This role involves hands-on lab work, data interpretation, and collaboration with cross-functional teams including sales, production, and quality. How You Will Do It Conduct routine and non-routine laboratory analyses on raw materials, intermediates, and finished products. Support technical service requests by performing application studies, product evaluations, and performance testing. Assist in troubleshooting customer issues and providing analytical reports and recommendations. Develop and optimize test methods, formulations, and application procedures as required. Maintain accurate documentation of experiments, test results, calibration logs, and lab reports. Ensure compliance with lab safety practices, ISO standards, and internal SOPs. Handle laboratory instruments such as GC, HPLC, UV-Vis, FTIR, viscometers, titrators, pH meters, etc. (Exposure preferred; training will be provided for freshers.) Prepare technical presentations, data summaries, and customer documentation when required. What We Look For Education: B.Tech / M.Sc in Chemistry, Industrial Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Polymer Science, Chemical Engineering. Experience: 1–5 years in technical service, R D, QC/QA, or application labs in chemical, polymer, coatings, adhesives, specialty chemicals, or related industries. 1–5 years of experience in Super Absorbent Polymer (SAP) [Must Have] Strong understanding of analytical chemistry, organic chemistry, or polymer chemistry concepts. Hands-on laboratory skills with good attention to detail. Ability to analyze data and interpret results accurately. Good communication skills for interacting with internal teams and customers. Problem-solving mindset with a willingness to learn and adapt. Organized, disciplined, and able to manage multiple tasks simultaneously. Work Location Innovation Campus Mumbai

jobs.title: Deputy Manager- Technical Service - Personal Care
jobs.description: About The Role Technical key account management and key interface of customers R D Translate the customer needs into technical projects briefing Drive Technical service projects delivery with business impact How You Will Do It 1. Technical Interface Application Development Serve as the gatekeeper for all R D and technical exchanges between customers and BASF. Develop appropriate solutions in lab and present technical proposals, new concepts, and application ideas tailored to customer needs. Support implementation of these solutions at customer sites through trials, formulation guidance, and troubleshooting. Provide technical consulting, training, and hands-on support to customers. 2. Technical Service Strategy Innovation Develop and execute proactive technical service strategies that enhance long-term customer loyalty. Identify customer-driven innovation opportunities and emerging application fields specific to Personal Care. Lead joint development projects with customers, ensuring strong project management and full accountability for deliverables. Manage and mitigate product and process risks, ensuring compliance with technical and regulatory standards. 3. Technical Key Account Management Stakeholder Influence Influence key decision-makers within customer organizations and internally within BASF—even without direct authority—to drive technical and commercial progress. Build and maintain strong, strategic, long-term relationships with key accounts across R D, procurement, marketing, operations, and leadership. Leverage in-depth knowledge of Personal Care formulations, applications, and market value chains to anticipate trends and guide customer development efforts. Act as the liaison between customer teams and internal BASF functions to ensure smooth communication and high customer satisfaction. 4. Capability Building Enhance the technical capability of the sales team and distributor teams through structured trainings, coaching, and joint customer visits. Promote strong cross-functional understanding of product performance and application behavior 5. EHS Compliance Follow and promote BASF’s Environmental, Health, and Safety (EHS) practices during all technical service activities. Ensure all technical recommendations meet regulatory and safety guidelines relevant to Personal Care products What We Look For Degree in Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, Cosmetic Science, or related discipline Experience in technical service, formulation development, or application support in Personal Care- 8 to 12 years Strong understanding of Surfactants, UV filters, Bio actives, Emollients and other Personal Care ingredients Hands-on experience with lab formulations and customer trials Strong communication, influencing skills, and project management capabilities Work Location Turbhe, Navi Mumbai

jobs.title: Business Development and TD - CASE Applications
jobs.description: O bjectives of the Position To implement CASE and eMobility, Performance Materials India sales marketing strategy in new business development and customers’ management by initiating contacts with existing and potential customers. Develop execute Business Development plan for CASE and eMobility in accordance with the country regional strategy and objectives. Establish foster strong relationship with customers industry. Identifying new business opportunities, managing relationships with key stakeholders, and executing strategic initiatives to meet CASE's business goals. M ain Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Business Development: Provide technical support and expertise on CASE (coatings, composites, adhesives, sealants, and elastomers) and eMobility products to clients and internal teams. Understand product specifications, applications, and industry standards. Identify, evaluate, develop, pursue, and implement new business opportunities and strategies that align with CASE's goals and objectives to increase market share and revenue. Assist the sales team with technical presentations, product demonstrations, and client training sessions. Collaborate with Technical Development Product Development teams to improve existing products and develop new solutions based on market needs. Manage projects related to product applications, client requirements, and technical support. Oversee and manage business development projects, ensuring timely and successful completion. Prepare and present regular reports on business development activities, market analysis, and client feedback. Monitor and report on business development activities, providing insights and recommendations for continuous improvement. Conduct market research to identify trends, competitor activities, and potential areas for growth. Provide insights to guide business strategies. Strategy: Define CASE and eMobility milestones, market directions, project pipeline (products applications), volume, profit, product portfolio and developmental goals directions in India. Identify business opportunity for established and new customer/product/application and develop value proposition on products and pricing for CASE and eMobility in India and provide on-going update to the regional team. Monitor and analyze development in the segment and initiate improvement opportunities. Scout, identify, analyze, define and set up target applications, target customers (OEMs Tiers), target products and drive the business growth for the accounts plan with the country with sales and TD team. Observe and transfer new market trend/development and prepare business case for new product or application development. Identify and prioritize translation/multiplication business opportunity globally from other countries or regions. Monitor legislative, technological and social changes in e-Mobility new energy and participate / lead the key industry associations in the segment in the country Develop deep knowledge of market intelligence network in the segment to be well prepared for marketing counter measures. Align and coordinate with regional CASE country PM units and reach out to collaborate with cross-divisional industry group or business units. Customer Management: Build and maintain relationships with key stakeholders, including clients, partners, and industry influencers. Understand market, customer, and industry needs and provide tailored solutions. Supports in providing the response related to quality, technical applications, inquiries, and other related issues, conducts customers’ assessments and analysis. Coordinate with BASF experts to conduct field visits, seminars, presentations and attend to customers’ inquiries. Conduct customers’ assessments and analyses to align and ensure the strategic focus in the right place. Ensure all supporting functions involved in the delivery of agreed customer’s needs; resolve problems/ expedite matters where appropriate. Share M arket Intelligence, strategy communicate internally via visit reports. Credit Management: Monitor the growth of the customers’ business, review and coordinate with credit controlling team to make appropriate credit recommendations. Follow-up on payment collections and ensure on-time payment from the customers. Team Collaboration: Work closely with cross-functional teams, including marketing, sales, Technical Development, Product Development, CSO, SCM, and production to ensure alignment and support for business initiatives. Job Requirements (m inimum requirement to carry out the work) Edu c a t i o n: Bachelor’s Science degree in Polymer, Chemistry or equivalent, such as Material Science, Chemical Engineering. Working Experience: 5-8 years technical sales working experience preferably with polyurethane industry, CASE background/experience preferred. Technical Professional Knowledge: In-depth knowledge of Business Development and technical know-how and applications of CASE, eMobility, New Energy and Polyurethane Industry. Applications, applications development, technical expertise, machines, and p rocessing experiences would be highly desirable. Have hands-on experience with polyurethanes (CASE) processing equipment in High/low pressure foaming machine, Spray foaming, etc., would be highly advantageous. Good English and computer skills (MS 365).

jobs.title: Production Executive
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position: As a designated Shift Supervisor, takes responsibility of Safety, Production, Quality of System House plant in the shifts. Main Tasks: Coordinate and manage production in shift with consistent Quality and Safety as per the target. Manage the manpower planning in the shift. (Employee and Contractor) Continuous improvement of processes in coordination with the Plant Manager and his Deputy Quality control to reduce batch cycle times, increase in yields, increase operational ease and ultimately leading to cost effective production. Whenever required, Coordinate with Supply chain and logistics team for adherence of production schedule and share the information to the team of change if any. Guiding a group of Operators in the plant continuously to ensure consistent product quality and safety. Implement Safety, Health and Environment system of the plant concerning man and equipment. Update knowledge and share the information of any change through proper channel. Ensure that discharge parameters of all the emissions in the plant are within the statutory limits and health and hygiene of the plant personnel is well maintained in the shifts. Ensuring proper implementation of norms as per the departmental operating procedures of ISO 9001, ISO 14001 ISO 50001 Energy Management system. Guide shop floor personnel towards SHE (Safety, Health and Environment) /(RC)Responsible care /cleanliness of the plant (5S) /discipline for improving the BASF’s safe work culture in the shifts. This ensures compliance of BASF’s statutory requirements, which also includes the training of the subordinates regarding the safety aspects and handling of the critical hazardous chemicals. Ensuring compliance to TDS requirements while performing activities like tanker loading, Tanker unloading, labelling and packing as and when required. Adherence to the PPE usage by self and plant personnel, ensure work permit system is properly followed in the shifts. Adherence to target agreement and perform additional responsibilities as per given timeline Prepare and share production reports to higher management. Co-ordinate with site functions like Warehouse, Engineering , WWTP, Admin and Quality team. Compliance to process safety and environmental protection code as per BASF Practice. Ensure the documentation of Responsible care requirement on continual basis. Act as EHS representative in the shifts. As a Part of ERT(Emergency Response Team), rush to the incident spot in case of emergency in the site. For emergency in System House plant, take a lead and coordinate with incident controller. Requirements: Bachelor of Science/ Diploma 4 - 5 years of experience in the relevant industry. Technical Professional Knowledge: Chemical Process and relevant experience.

jobs.title: Site HR & Employee Relations - Thane Site
jobs.description: Site HR Manager – Thane Site Location - Thane, India 1. Objectives of the Position: The Site Employee Relations Manager will play a critical role in fostering a positive work environment and enhancing employee engagement. This position is responsible for overseeing all aspects of human resources administration, employee relations, and ensuring compliance with company policies and legal regulations. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in HR practices, excellent communication skills, and a commitment to promoting a healthy workplace culture. Human Resources / Employee Relations: • Employee Industrial Relations: Maintain discipline, foster a positive work culture, and ensure cordial relations with government authorities. • CSR Community Development: Coordinate CSR initiatives with the corporate team and implement community programs under CAP guidelines. • Training Engagement: Identify skill gaps, conduct training programs, and enhance employee engagement levels. • HR Operations: Manage time office, wage and salary administration, and ensure compliance with all labor laws and statutory requirements. • Contract Legal Compliance: Oversee contract labor deployment, ensure contractor compliance, and represent labor-related legal matters in court. • Site Administration: Supervise security, health services, welfare measures, housekeeping, green belt upkeep, and ensure adherence to RC codes for HR and admin. 2. Representatives Main Tasks: a. Workforce Management: Ensure discipline, optimize manpower utilization, manage recruitment, and oversee wage and salary administration in coordination with the Hub Team. b. Training Development: Implement training programs as per the calendar, including safety training with EHS, and manage TDS documentation and compliance. c. Employee Engagement Communication: Drive engagement activities, internal/external communication (RC Code-8), and foster a positive work culture and morale. d. Organizational Development: Lead manpower planning and support organizational change initiatives to align with company goals. e. Industrial Legal Compliance: Maintain cordial union relations, resolve grievances, ensure statutory compliance under labor laws, and represent the company in legal and conciliation matters. f. Site Operations Safety: Oversee security services, fire safety, emergency response, canteen, health center, housekeeping, and green belt maintenance, ensuring adherence to EHS S and C.A.R.E. principles. g. Public Relations CSR: Lead community development initiatives, liaise with government officials and local leaders, and actively participate in industry associations to enhance company reputation. h. People Performance Management: Drive employee motivation, talent development, manpower planning, budgeting, and implement idea management to improve departmental efficiency and results. i. External Liaison Approvals: Authorized to interact and negotiate with contractors, government officials, trade unions, and local bodies; responsible for PR and SOP approvals. j. Site Operations Compliance: Oversees safety, 5S, work permits, manpower allocation, and ensures compliance with RC codes and ISO standards (9001, 14001, 45001, 50001). k. Leadership Environment: Drives departmental motivation, manages budgets, supports talent development, and ensures a clean, safe, and efficient working environment aligned with EHS and C.A.R.E. principles. • Education Qualification: • Degree in Human Resources. • Demonstrated knowledge of Labour Laws • Outstanding interpersonal skills. • Exceptional written and verbal communication. • Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail. • Good problem-solving ability. • More than 10-12 years of working experience preferably in chemical or petrochemical plant operation. • Min 2 years of experience in leadership position. - Suggested Competencies • Core competencies: Decision making, Striving for Achievement, Customer Focus, Communication and Interpersonal Understanding • Leadership competencies: Leading Employees to Success, Teamworking • Professional competencies/ Functional competencies: Innovativeness, Analytical Thinking, Conflict Management, Safety, Health and Environment Awareness

jobs.title: Talent Community | BASF Digital Hub Hyderabad
jobs.description: WELCOME TO BASF  At BASF Digital Hub Hyderabad, we’re shaping the future of the chemical industry through innovation, creativity, and collaboration. As we continue to grow, we’re building a talent pipeline for IT Professionals who want to make a difference. WHY JOIN OUR TALENT COMMUNITY?  We are continuously building a community of forward‑thinking professionals who are passionate about technology, innovation, and impactful problem‑solving. We are opening positions across a variety of technical domains, and we’re always excited to connect with individuals who bring curiosity, adaptability, and a strong desire to grow. As part of our talent community, you may be considered for future opportunities in areas such as software engineering, data science, cloud engineering, ERPs (SAP, ServiceNow, etc), cybersecurity, Artificial Intelligence, RPA automation, and platform operations. If you thrive in environments where continuous learning and collaboration are part of everyday life, apply here. WHAT WE OFFER  A secure work environment because your health, safety and wellbeing is always our top priority Learning and development opportunities A collaborative, trustful and innovative work environment Being part of an international team and work in global projects Diversity is our greatest strength!  Become a part of our winning formula for success and develop the future with us - in a global team that embraces inclusion and equal opportunities irrespective of gender, age, origin, sexual orientation, disability or belief.

jobs.title: Manager - Process Safety & Emergency Response
jobs.description: About The Role Be responsible to support service recipients in implementing BASF Group EHS requirements and guidance documents, to provide consultancy and support to fulfill legal and BASF requirements on process safety in India or in Asia Pacific countries if requested Act as a Process Safety expert to ensure high quality Safety, Health Environment (SHE) Reviews for new capital investment projects and existing plant according to BASF Group EHS requirements and guidance documents Provide guidance in implementation of guidelines and programs through workshops and training, and monitoring implementation at the site by continuous reviews, assessments, and audits to achieve and continuously improve high standards of Process Safety performance Review Safety, Health Environment (SHE) critical changes at the sites as part of MOC (Management of Changes) process, non-standard or new activities at the site level. How You Will Do It Process Safety Facilitate and coordinate SHE review process (SHE 0 to SHE 4 – Facility siting till Pre startup safety review) for new capital investment projects in India or in Asia Pacific region as requested according to the BASF Group EHS requirements and guidance documents using ICI HAZOP or equivalent techniques Facilitate and coordinate periodic hazard analysis (“Revalidation” and “Clean Sheet” SHE Reviews) for existing plants in India or as requested by regional office as per relevant mandatory requirements using ICI HAZOP or equivalent techniques Provide support to manufacturing sites/plants for preparation of BASF internal audit through questionnaire review, site inspections, documents review, measures for improvement and to follow up for closure of non-compliance Support Process Safety workshops/seminars and provide training to enhance sub region-wide competence in process safety for BASF in India as per the mandatory regional process safety training matrix Communicate support the global process safety related issues or goals into practical programs and systems by providing implementation tools to service recipients in India . Support and coordinate the roll-out of such programs Act as competence center and advisor for process safety issues (e.g., explosion protection document preparation, guidance on internal and local requirements, safety review for critical changes at site as part of MOC process, non-standard or new activities at the site level) for BASF in India and other countries as requested by regional offices Communicate with Regional Competence Center for Process Safety for new BASF Internal directive, requirements and other Process Safety related projects and activities. Support sites in interpreting and implementing BASF process safety requirements Manage, lead, train and develop subordinates, Process Safety Coordinators, Plant Team members and Management of Change (MOC) Coordinators to build Process Safety related knowledge Oversee all process safety incidents of the country, support to service recipients for incident investigation processes, investigation of Process Safety incidents using root cause analysis methodology, recommend corrective measures and ensure completion of recommendations Consolidate follow-up on status of action items of reviews Monitor the process safety performance, sharing of process safety incidents with all site colleagues in country as part of knowledge sharing Support Business Units, as requested, for assessment of vendors, suppliers, service providers from BASF EHS perspective Work towards achieving “Process Safety Expertise level 3” (a pool of highly competent process safety experts in BASF) for self in alignment and guidance from regional process safety group Emergency Response Advise, assist country management and Site Managers on Emergency Response Planning and Fire Prevention Requirements and Guidance Documents and support implementation. Review of Site / Plant Emergency Response Plans Conduct onsite/offsite mock drills and Desk–Top Exercises Support management and control of emergency response related to offsite transport incidents/accidents. Conduct Fire Prevention Inspection/Assessments at Sites/Plants as per COR R1 requirements, prepare report, recommend improvement action and follow-up review or closure of improvement actions Develop and ensure implementation of Crisis Management plan according to Regional Security Guidelines and standards Country Leadership Act as Country Responsible care (RC) Code Leader on Process Safety. Provide advisory and consultancy services to the sites and interface with regional office Implement country strategy in ensuring legal compliance, corporate conformance, and continuous improvement in own responsible care Process Safety code Be On-demand responsible care code services to Sites. Perform day-to-day consolidated functional responsible care code tasks Establish and maintain India responsible care code requirements What We Look For Graduate in Chemical Engineering (B.E/B.Tech-Chemical) (as minimum) Diploma in Industrial Safety would be additional advantage but not mandatory At least 10 years working experience in Chemical, Petrochemical production Plants or EHS area particularly in handling Process Safety of hazardous plants Must possess knowledge of Process Safety Knowledge of operating production plant(s) comprising various unit operations Demonstrated knowledge of common hazard assessment techniques is mandatory (e.g., ICI HAZOP or similar technique) Conduct process safety risk analysis, HAZOP (Hazard and Operability study) Well-developed conflict management skill to reach team consensus is mandatory. Proficient command of spoken and written English is mandatory Work Location Godrej One - Mumbai

jobs.title: Production Executive
jobs.description: About The Role According to the Plant / Production Manager’s direction and plant production guidance, implement the correct production procedures by and assigning duties to the Senior Chemist Junior Chemist and directing their activities to ensure the production completed timely in quality and quantity. How You Will Do It Supervise production Coordinate and monitor the whole process, schedule, priorities of production in shift and respond to any deviations required arising out of the reports (e.g. shift production performance, quality report from lab, quality control department) by effective corrective actions. Set and continuously update production schedules and regulate work flow to ensure maximum use of machinery / equipment capacity and utility supply at minimum costs and fulfill daily/ weekly/ monthly production plan, including trial production. Ensure optimal use of resources to meet the demand Coordinate with Warehouse Team for timely receiving Raw material as per pull list and timely dispatch of Finished Goods from Plant. Coordination with Maintenance Interface with maintenance personnel to expedite correction of non-conformances to prevent and minimize the interruption of engineering malfunctioning. Timely resolve regular and minor problems onsite when incident happens. Report to supervisor of any major problems and take corrective action with proper help after approval is obtained. Quality control Follow plant quality policy and product specifications, ensure to produce quality produce by following production procedures Follow daily inspections in shop floor to ensure high sustained quality product. Production records Raise relevant production records/statistics to Production Manager / Planner / Operations Leader in order to plan, set and update production schedules when necessary, regulate work flow to ensure maximum use of capacity and efficiency. Safety and housekeeping Follow corporate, company and statutory EHS requirements, implement the relevant safety and environment protection procedures Ensure that down the line personnel are following all company’s procedure including operations, safety and housekeeping guidelines to maintain a working environment that supports work safety and production activities. Maintenance of pipelines carrying effluent from plant to ETP Takeover the role of safety representative in the shifts. Implement the Responsible care requirement and guidelines on continual basis. Takeover the role of safety representative in the shifts. People management Conduct trainings to down the line personnel to update their production methods/skills, as and when required. Manage people in the shifts and ensure proper resources are available as per the safety guidelines What We Look For Engineering Graduate Chemical technology / Polymer or related More than 5 years of working experience in plant operation, preferably in a PU Polymer plant. Core competencies: Demonstrate customer focus, Act with entrepreneurial drive, Communicate Effectively Professional competencies: Work Management / Planning and Organizing, Safety, Health and Environment Awareness. Work Location Thane, India

jobs.title: Head of Global Application Labs, Pharma Solutions
jobs.description: Position Title : Head of Global Application Labs – Pharma Solutions Department/Function : G-ENP/ML – Global Application Lab Reporting Line: VP, Global Business Management, Excipients Biopharma (G-ENP/M) Summary of Role: Responsible for high quality, aligned and prioritized global Application and Product Data generation and management. Leading all regional Pharma Application Labs via the local Application Lab Leaders, to ensure efficient, effective and globally aligned and balanced organization of lab activities and resource deployment. Strong stakeholder management collaborating with Heads of Technical Sales, Technical Product Management Marketing, and Development. Key Responsibilities: Organizational Aspects: Global management of lab resources with strong project alignment, prioritization and steering. Responsible for allocation of CapEx for global labs, lab project pipeline and reporting. Steering of, and resource-allocation for data generation on a global level incl. timing, assignment and coordination. Stakeholder Management : Strong collaboration with Heads of Regional Technical Sales, Head of Technical Marketing, and Technical Product Management to ensure teams will be provided with relevant, high-quality application and product data in an effective and efficient manner. Ensuring Global Standards: Development, implementation and maintenance of global standards for application and product data generation, including methods, quality, experimental design, DOE, lab team trainings, to ensure global harmonization and efficient use of resources. Regular quality assurance e.g., by recurring round robin tests. Development of application expertise for new / upcoming applications. Leadership : Functional lead of the Regional Application Lab Leaders and the Application Experts, incl. lab team training, development and global collaboration and exchange, balancing short / mid / long term lab activities and aligning timelines and priorities. Product Launch Support: Close collaboration with Head of Development to jointly generate data during development and launch phase of new products, providing application feedback to Development team, launch data to Technical Marketing, and ensuring that all regional labs are familiar with the new product prior to launch. Competency Skills: Ensuring high standard in scientific acumen. Arrange global technical team training, exchange, and develop teams experience on key topics like applications, scientific work, documentation etc. External Representation: Represent BASF at key conferences and relevant industry associations. Expected Travel ~35% global Required Skills Experience: • Deep understanding of pharmaceutical applications, excipients, and product data generation. • Strong foundation in experimental design, DOE (Design of Experiments), and analytical methods. • Proven track record in leading cross-regional technical teams, including mentoring, training, and developing lab personnel. • Ability to balance short-, mid-, and long-term priorities across global teams. • Skilled in managing global lab resources, CapEx allocation, and project pipelines. • Experience in prioritizing and steering complex technical projects across multiple regions. • Strong interpersonal and communication skills to collaborate effectively with multiple global stakeholders and navigate complex stakeholder environments and influence decision-making • Proficiency in managing technical documentation, application data, and ensuring consistency and accessibility across global teams. • Experience organizing global technical training programs and facilitating knowledge exchange on key scientific and application topics. • Strong understanding of internal processes incl. production, quality, regulatory, supply chain • PhD in Chemistry or Pharmacy, MBA or equivalent business qualification is a plus . • 15 Years experience, 8 years management

jobs.title: Assistant Manager - Application Development 1

Promotion of Cellasto NVH products by replacement competing low cost materials. Analyze customer product designs specifications, understand design changes and provide technical proposals/ideas / solutions after doing simulations submit design proposals. Follow up with customer for report approval PSW release Record all project documents as per APQP / IATF16949 and BASF guidelines until and upload on CDB Customer complaint management: Analyze and understand the failure modes; Cascade the information within CFT and initiate countermeasure actions Ensure part design change and validation as a part of countermeasure action, if applicable Initiate change management process internally and at customer end, if required Submit the action plan (in 8D format) to customer Follow up for all action items, monitor improvement outcome and information sharing with customer Coordination with group companies for Cellasto Project Management activities Be part of GKAM/RKAM and support Global teams with India inputs as well get support for India projects Regular customer visits and collection of information related to new projects, competitors activities etc and support to create strategies accordingly. Customer Mapping, understand the organization map for key OEM s Tier I s in India/Global and prepare decision making matrix and develop strategy accordingly Support Sales Engineering function activities for customer Audits by documentation preparation, coordination with other functions for successful Audit. Support activities to improve plant operational performance by designing right product first time, rejection rate reduction activities etc. GKAM Technical Support: Be part of all technical development projects of Cellasto in GKAM Participate and Support in RFI / RFQs analysis, support in solution design to Project Leader Support in Testing development activities at plant for Global projects as and when required Team work with all GKAM colleagues for successful project management and Start of production Required Competencies Technical skills of design of automotive parts Knowledge of Automotive product development process, documentations customer requirements Excellent communication skills Customer focus and Collaborate for achievement Entrepreneurial drive and Innovation focus M ini m um E d u cation and Q u alifica t ion R e q ui r ed Edu c a t i o n: Bachelor of Engineering CAD/CAM Certifications W o r k in g E x pe r i e n c e: 7-12 Years of hands on experience in Automotive TIER-I / TIER-II company T e c hn i c a l P r o f e ss i o n a l K n o w l ed g e: Designing of Automotive components Project Management

jobs.title: Research Chemist
jobs.description: MAIN TASKS Synthesis and scale-up of small organic molecules / intermediates / active ingredients on milligram to multikilogram quantities Planning of synthesis including retrosynthesis and literature search Process development optimization of routes to advanced intermediates/finished products (chemical, physical and preparative). Sc.) in organic chemistry with sound theoretical knowledge in organic synthesis Working experience of 5 to 8 years in chemical / pharmaceutical / agrochemical industry as a chemist Should possess adequate communication technical skills required to perform the job

Pursue customer driven innovations / New application and manage joint development projects with full accountability Collaborate with Internal /External stake holders of business value chain partner for new business development Facilitate Formulation development with the lab and region in collaboration with PD Team Ensure closure of Timely NCM resolution, liquidation of non-moving /aged stock and settlement of customer issues Serve as a liaison between Country TD, PD and respective Region team to translate success stories into business growth. jobs.title: Lab Team Leader
jobs.description: Objective To lead a team of chemists and engineer for successful execution of research projects within specified timeline and budget while adhering to company EHS guidelines and policies. To create innovative projects and bring new know-how, technologies, products, and processes for the company. Main Task Be in charge of functional leadership of the lab team. Observes and validates market trends and competitor activities (products, patents, literature). Recommend for new products/projects/applications within the innovation flow in cooperation with the concerned project team. Defines initiates and leads market-/customer related projects and product developments. Monitor, validate and document progresses achievements of milestones, coordinate the transfer of results into pilot plant, production and other business units if necessary. B e in constant touch with scientific partners and operative units. Extend his own knowledge constantly. Works within the allocated budget. Organizes the workflow in the lab in cooperation with the lab team and coordinate activities in the pilot plant if necessary. Be responsible for compliance of working-. security- and environmental policies within his scope of responsibility. Initiate endangerment assessments and initialize arrangements. Ensures acquisition, documentation, enhancement and transfer of existing and elaborated knowledge to all levels. Enables clarification of technical, patent legal as well as economic assumptions within projects and process development in cooperation with the concerned unit. M ini m um E d u cation and Q u alifica t ion R e q ui r ed for t he P osition Ph.D. Chemistry (Organic Chemistry) with 1-2 years of postdoctoral research experience

jobs.title: Deputy Manager - Sales, Acrylic Acid & Esters
jobs.description: O bjectives of the Position : Drive Sales Business development activities for CPH SBU in sub region, including working with channel partners as appropriate M ain Tasks: CPH sales Service existing B2B customers and identify new customers to diversify customer base to ensure sustainable and healthy business development for CPH in the subregion. Manage the complete sales cycle with the customer. Develop lasting customer relationships to identify business trends in and beyond the customer scope or respective portfolio. Monitor competition by gathering market information on pricing, products, new product development, business models. Provide accurate sales forecast, supporting efficient planning of products and services. Identify customer requirements and offer solutions accordingly. Negotiate and close deals or contracts with customers and provide operational guidance and support to the relevant functional departments to ensure implementation. Implement customer and segment-specific strategies in alignment with Marketing. Distributor Management - Train, motivate, monitor and engage assigned distributors/agents to achieve business results as per plan. Utilize distributor/agents’ operations to increase BASF's competitiveness in the market. Regular market mapping for CPH business in subregion to understand market movement, competition demand / supply development. Plan, lead and carry out sales activities to achieve sales targets by calling and visiting existing/prospective Specialty Monomers customers to understand and identify their needs to create a long-term customer supplier relationship. Provide customer credit information for company credit control function, ensure timely payment of receivables to meet established sales targets and revenue goals. Focusing on opportunities to develop new customers and new application areas Key Account Management (CPH) T ake ownership of key accounts, including the development and execution of the account strategy and ensure alignment with corporate key account strategy. Develop and maintain long term business relationships. Serve as a liaison between account and BASF departments to provide ongoing support and ensure customer satisfaction . M inimum Education and Qualification Required for the Position: Education: Chemical Engineering, min B. Tech / equivalent Working Experience: min 5 ~ 8 years in the chemical industry Professional Knowledge: B2B sales, commodities/specialties market dynamics

jobs.title: Manager, Technical Sales
jobs.description: About the Role Our unit G-EVC/MA serves clients and partners with a custom and market business model. Key targets are the identification of opportunities, converting opportunities into business through technical dialogue with customers and selling value of BASF technology and capability, as well as building and maintaining partnerships and client interactions aimed at growth in India and South Asia. How You Will Do It Identify new industry trends and partnerships, grow lead pipeline and develop leads to opportunities Build and grow relationships with new customers including major chemical/petrochemical companies, international process licensors, engineering companies, research institutes as well as start-up companies with the target to deliver both top-line and bottom-line results within a cross-functional team and matrix organization. Plan and execute marketing communication activities and consistently drive marketing messages into appropriate channels such as social media, press, conferences, advertisements and other publications Coordinate and align with the global team to provide technical and commercial offers to customers in India and South Asia including Bangladesh and Pakistan. Build and grow position as technology leader by increasing understanding of customers processes and operating conditions as well as competitive developments - document respective findings Ability to use discretion and maintain confidentiality to safeguard Intellectual Property (IP) and know-how owned by third party customers and IP/know-how owned jointly with BASF What We Look For Master degree or above in chemical engineering or chemistry. Working Experience: Min. 5 years of technical experience in the field of chemical catalysts, chemical/petrochemical process design or production. Technical Professional Knowledge: Experience with customer interaction; Good communication skills, team player able to work across organizational boundaries. Have strong customer focus and excellent communication skills in English (both speaking and writing). Be able to work under pressure and motivated to achieve success together as a team. Work Location Godrej One - Mumbai
